GoodFellow) were irradiated with 27 MeV 3He beam for 1

Faraday-cup, initial irradiation beam energy was
adopted from cyclotron settings. Energy loss was
calculated by using SRIN-2010 code. Bombarding energy

The energy uncertainty of the primary beam
was +- 0.3MeV. The uncertainty of the energy of the
bombarding beam in the middle of each irradiated foil
was estimated combining the uncertainties of the
energy degradation depending on the thickness of the
target foils in the stack and the energy straggling.
